headline: PROVE READINESS, NOT INTENTION
subheading: Reach genuine MIA and WDA licence readiness before you ever submit to the MHRA.
flux_prompt: A clinical-luxury editorial composition in deep navy graduating into teal and cyan, with a single fresh-green accent glow signalling approval. Conceptual metaphor of regulatory readiness: a pristine glass-walled pharmaceutical facility seen through layered translucent panels, where an open bound site master file and a precise checklist of glowing teal verification ticks float above a calm reflective desk, each tick connected by fine luminous lines to abstract qualification gauges and audit-trail data ribbons. A subtle threshold or doorway of soft cyan light suggests a final gate before approval, while out-of-focus stainless-steel cleanroom equipment recedes behind frosted glass. Shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, immaculate premium surfaces, calm and authoritative atmosphere of final checks before a decision, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
